title: epiphyllum anguligerum
intro: Epiphyllum anguligerum, also known as the "Queen of the Night" or "Night-blooming cereus," is a species of epiphytic cactus that belongs to the family of flowering plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Epiphyllum anguligerum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve sleep quality, and reduce stress levels. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
